ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "handicap" REAL /* Handicap of the player */,
  "professional_since" TEXT /* Date the player turned professional */,
  "current_rank" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "swing_style" TEXT /* Swing style of the player */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the coach */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the coach (e.g., swing coach, mental coach) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "rounds_played" INTEGER /* Number of rounds played */,
  "avg_distance_to_pin" REAL /* Average distance to the pin from a specific distance */,
  "total_distance_feet" REAL /* Total distance in feet covered in proximity to the hole */,
  "off_shots" INTEGER /* Number of off-shots */,
  "scrambling_rank" INTEGER /* Scrambling rank of the player */,
  "rank_this_week" INTEGER /* Rank of the player this week */,
  "rank_last_week" INTEGER /* Rank of the player last week */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_metric_name FOREIGN KEY ("metric_name") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "prize_fund" REAL /* Total prize fund of the tournament */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "par" INTEGER /* Par of the course */,
  "yardage" INTEGER /* Yardage of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_tournament_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the tournament */,
  "rounds_played" INTEGER /* Number of rounds played in the tournament */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total score of the player in the tournament */,
  "placement" INTEGER /* Final placement of the player in the tournament */,
  "cut_made" INTEGER /* Whether the player made the cut */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournament_records_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournament_records_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's tournament record */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number (1, 2, 3, 4) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the player in the round */,
  "par" INTEGER /* Par of the course for the round */,
  "distance_to_pin" REAL /* Average distance to the pin from a specific distance */,
  "scrambling_success" INTEGER /* Whether the player successfully scrambled in the round */,
  "fairways_hit" REAL /* Percentage of fairways hit */,
  "greens_in_regulation" REAL /* Percentage of greens in regulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES player_tournament_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric type */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., yards, feet, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yearly_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yearly statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistic */,
  "stat_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic type */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player in the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yearly_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yearly_stats_stat_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_type_id") REFERENCES stat_types ("stat_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stat_types" (
  "stat_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat type */,
  "stat_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the statistic type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the statistic (e.g., yards, feet, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_career_stats" (
  "career_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each career statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "stat_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic type */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the career statistic */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the career statistic */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the career statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("career_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_career_stats_stat_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_type_id") REFERENCES stat_types ("stat_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_career_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user role (e.g., admin, coach, player) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the note is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was written */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., injury, performance, personal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_notes_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date of recovery */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the injury */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_sponsorships" (
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sponsorship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sponsorship */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Value of the sponsorship contract */,
  "sponsorship_type" TEXT /* Type of sponsorship (e.g., equipment, apparel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_sponsorships_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_sponsorships_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)
